---
title: 'Contact'
date: '2017-11-28T06:08:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Creatively Unique Arts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '7988092528429677902'
blogger_filename: '/p/contact.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatively Unique Arts/feed.atom'
---

<i>Have a question, concern, special request?</i><br />
<br />
There are several ways you can contact us, or keep in touch:<br />
<br />
<b>Email</b>: <a href="mailto:info@CreativelyUniqueArts.com" target="_blank">info@CreativelyUniqueArts.com</a><br />
<br />
<b>Etsy</b>: <a href="https://www.etsy.com/shop/CreativelyUniqueArts?ref=seller-platform-mcnav" target="_blank">CreativelyUniqueArts</a><br />
<br />
<b>Facebook</b>: <a href="https://www.facebook.com/CreativelyUniqueArts/" target="_blank">CreativelyUniqueArts</a><br />
<br />
<b>Pinterest</b>: <a href="https://www.pinterest.com/CreativelyUniqueArts/pins/" target="_blank">CreativelyUniqueArts</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe
